# SkillForge Demo

> Two skills generated by SkillForge from vague user requests.

---

## responsive-a11y-review

**Summary:** Reviews frontend UI changes for responsive layout breakage and accessibility violations before deployment.

**Generated files:**

```
.opencode/skills/responsive-a11y-review/
├── SKILL.md
├── README.md
└── templates/
    └── report.md
```

**Trigger prompt:**

> "Review my frontend UI changes for responsive and a11y problems."

**What this proved:** SkillForge can take a vague 2-domain request ("responsive and accessibility"), resolve partial overlap with an existing skill (`frontend-review`), and produce a specialized skill with viewport presets, a11y tool detection, and read-only safety boundaries.

---

## ai-claim-audit

**Summary:** Audits AI-generated answers for unsupported claims, overconfident language, and weak evidence.

**Generated files:**

```
.opencode/skills/ai-claim-audit/
├── SKILL.md
├── README.md
└── templates/
    └── ledger.md
```

**Trigger prompt:**

> "Audit this AI answer for evidence quality."

**What this proved:** SkillForge can handle abstract, non-code-domain requests ("check if an AI sounds too confident"), build a custom claim taxonomy (6 types, 5 evidence statuses), enforce text-internal analysis rules, and produce a structured ledger output contract.
